name: Hash & Encoding API
description: All-in-one hashing, HMAC, encoding/decoding, bcrypt, and secure random generation API. Supports MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA-512 hashing with hex and base64 output. Encode/decode in Base64, URL, HTML, and Hex formats. Bcrypt password hashing with configurable rounds and constant-time comparison. Cryptographically secure random byte generation.

endpoints.name: Generate Hash
endpoints.description: Hash text using MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, or SHA-512. Returns hex and base64.

endpoints.name: Generate HMAC
endpoints.description: Generate HMAC signature with a secret key.

endpoints.name: Encode Text
endpoints.description: Encode text to base64, URL, HTML entities, or hex.

endpoints.name: Decode Text
endpoints.description: Decode from base64, URL, HTML entities, or hex.

endpoints.name: Bcrypt Compare
endpoints.description: Compare plaintext against a bcrypt hash using constant-time comparison.

long_description:
## Overview

All-in-one hashing, HMAC, encoding/decoding, bcrypt, and secure random generation API. Supports MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA-512 with hex and base64 output. Includes bcrypt password hashing with constant-time comparison. Built on Cloudflare Workers.

## Key Features

- ✅ Multiple hash algorithms: MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA-512
- ✅ HMAC signature generation with custom secret keys
- ✅ Bcrypt password hashing with configurable rounds (4-31)
- ✅ Encode/decode in Base64, URL, HTML entities, and Hex
- ✅ Cryptographically secure random byte generation

## Use Cases

- **Authentication Systems**: Hash and verify passwords with bcrypt
- **API Security**: Generate HMAC signatures for webhook verification
- **Data Integrity**: Compute file and content checksums (SHA-256)
- **Web Development**: Encode/decode URLs, HTML entities, and Base64 data
- **Security Auditing**: Generate secure random tokens and API keys

## Quick Start

```
POST /hash
Content-Type: application/json

{"text": "Hello World", "algorithm": "sha256"}
```

Returns JSON with `hex` and `base64` hash values.

## Pricing

| Plan | Price | Requests/mo | Rate Limit |
|------|-------|-------------|------------|
| **Basic (FREE)** | $0 | 500 | 1/sec |
| Pro | $5 | 50,000 | 10/sec |
| Ultra | $15 | 500,000 | 50/sec |

Free tier includes all 8 endpoints. No credit card required.
